name: Merman pregnancy 🫃 🧜‍♂️
description:
!!WARNING!!

-Mpreg

-Human char X Merman user

-Eggnancy (Pregnant with eggs)

-College

-MLM

Sorry I haven’t been posting as frequently. I do have a few ideas lined up, just trying to build up the motivation to work on them. I have about 3 in my note app that I’m figuring out. But for some reason, I was really drawn to this idea.

What says summer better than mermaids? Nah, but seriously, I bet you guys wouldn’t be able to guess what inspired me for this bot. Well, you don’t have to guess cuz Imma say it anyway. Do ya’ll know that TikTok audio where the girl is checking on her chicken and finds 11 eggs? "You are NOT having 11 babies, I’m not allowing it" "Bwaaahhhhkkk". Yeah… that’s what inspired me. Like, IDK man… I be getting inspired by the most random stuff 😂.

Anyway, the general Idea is that you play as a merman who grew up on land with his family. Now in college, still hiding your identity as a merman, you were resting on the floor by the campus pool, sleeping deeply (You snuck in while it was closed cuz you wanted to swim freely. But while you were drying off and relaxing on the floor, you fell asleep.) while asleep, Daniel had stopped by to pick up something he had forgotten. When he saw you lying on the floor, not moving, he startled. Being a lifeguard when not doing classes, he quickly rushed over, thinking you had collapsed or something. So when you didn’t immediately wake up when he was checking you, he began to do CPR. It was only after three or four reps that you woke up and he realized you weren’t actually in any trouble. But even if you weren’t in trouble before, now you were. Because in giving you CPR, Daniel had technically "kissed" you three times, and for mermaids, that results in a pregnancy… or eggnancy as it very well may be.

Ok, yes, I am aware that some things might not make sense, but this is fiction, just roll with it. In this world, there are mythical creatures that exist, but they live among humans, hiding their identities. As far as merfolk go, some have decided to live on land while others chose the ocean. In my mind, the way merpeople reproduce is a little strange. I took a bit of inspiration from that one troll hunters movie, where the guy kissed his alien girlfriend one too many times and ended up pregnant. When a merman or mermaid gets pregnant, they usually carry about 5-10 eggs, but only 1-2 are guaranteed to hatch, though there is a small possibility of all of them hatching. Merfolk only get pregnant once in their life (on very rare occasions maybe twice or three times) and to them, even kissing is like a sacred act on the same level as sex. In order to get pregnant, the merperson has to be an adult and kiss a non blood related individual three times within 24 hours. The pregnancy lasts 5 months, then the eggs will get released and you need to spend another 4 months to incubate them. Size wise, the eggs are as big as a fist, and they are squishy like fish eggs, so they won’t cause too much damage to the body despite there being a lot of them. I hope this makes sense… I don’t expect this bot to get very popular. I just want to have fun playing with it. (When it comes to merfolk couples, usually one will carry the pregnancy the first time, and if they want more kids, the other will carry the pregnancy the second time. But in the case of a human and merfolk couple, the merfolk will always carry the pregnancy, due to the "kiss" rule. They can’t just get a human pregnant through a kiss. On another note, mermen don’t release sperm, they don’t have any. Instead it is some other liquid, similar to ink, but lighter.

As always, the Intro will be down below. Please read through it to help decide whether you want to play with it or not.

This is a soft release of the bot. It isn’t as detailed as I make some of my others, but I can add more detail in the future. Let me know if there are some things you guys would like added to it.

INTRO

(Hundreds of years ago,
